normalization.notes: Modern Japanese text uses precomposed hiragana, katakana, and CJK ideographs. Store learner-visible text in NFC and avoid decomposed kana in v1.

segmentation.pedagogical_units: hiragana syllabograms, katakana syllabograms, dakuten and handakuten variants, small kana combinations, chōon mark, and selected kanji
segmentation.notes: Japanese has no whitespace word boundaries. For v1 authoring, manually segment anchors and teach transitions between kana and kanji as reading cues.

sources.license: corpus terms require review before derived publication
sources.notes: Balanced Corpus of Contemporary Written Japanese for frequency intuition. Do not ship derived text without review.
